LanguageData.XGun_RoarMX.label: Roar MOD
LanguageData.XGun_RoarMX.description: A illegally modified version which added a preserize mod to it. Its range is longer than a normal version.
LanguageData.XGun_RoarMX.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_RoarMX.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_RoarBM.label: Roar BM
LanguageData.XGun_RoarBM.description: A illegally modified version which added a preserize mod to it. Its range is longer than a normal version.
LanguageData.XGun_RoarBM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_RoarBM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_GvE_T.label: .50 Black Core Tracer Bullet
LanguageData.XGun_GvEMX.label: Good vs Evil MOD
LanguageData.XGun_GvEMX.description: A illegally modified version which extand the barrel and redisgin its rifling. Its range is longer than normal version. Prepare to be blinded the fucking eyes of the target!
LanguageData.XGun_GvEMX.tools.0.label: good
LanguageData.XGun_GvEMX.tools.1.label: evil
LanguageData.XGun_GvEBM.label: Good vs Evil BM
LanguageData.XGun_GvEBM.description: A illegally modified version which extand the barrel and redisgin its rifling. Its range is longer than normal version. Prepare to be blinded the fucking eyes of the target!
LanguageData.XGun_GvEBM.tools.0.label: good
LanguageData.XGun_GvEBM.tools.1.label: evil
LanguageData.XGun_PythonMX.label: Python MOD
LanguageData.XGun_PythonMX.description: A illegally modified version which modified its clips and coolant. Its supressing ability is greater than normal version.
LanguageData.XGun_PythonMX.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_PythonMX.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_PythonBM.label: Python BM
LanguageData.XGun_PythonBM.description: A illegally modified version which modified its clips and coolant. Its supressing ability is greater than normal version.
LanguageData.XGun_PythonBM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_PythonBM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_ProbeMX.label: Probe MOD
LanguageData.XGun_ProbeMX.description: A illegally modified version which add on a new stabilizer, greatly improve its aiming speed.
LanguageData.XGun_ProbeMX.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_ProbeMX.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_ProbeBM.label: Probe BM
LanguageData.XGun_ProbeBM.description: A illegally modified version which add on a new stabilizer, greatly improve its aiming speed.
LanguageData.XGun_ProbeBM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_ProbeBM.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.Bullet_LightSpearX.label: Plasma
LanguageData.XGun_LightSpearMX.label: Light Spear MOD
LanguageData.XGun_LightSpearMX.description: A illegally modified version which modified its charging device. Its shooting mode is different from normal version.
LanguageData.XGun_LightSpearMX.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_LightSpearMX.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.XGun_LightSpearBM.label: Light Spear BM
LanguageData.XGun_LightSpearBM.description: A illegally modified version which modified its charging device. Its shooting mode is different from normal version.
LanguageData.XGun_LightSpearBM.tools.0.label: stock
LanguageData.XGun_LightSpearBM.tools.1.label: barrel
